## Radar update checklist

_If this PR changes `radar.yaml`, check these before merging. Delete this section for code-only changes._

- [ ] `last_updated` date has been updated
- [ ] `python radar.py validate` passes locally
- [ ] Entries are in the correct quadrant section (grouped by comment headers)
- [ ] New entries have a description
